Business Name: Dolly's Tennessean Travel Stop
Description: Full-service 24-hour travel center at I-65 Exit 22 (US-31A, Cornersville). Established 1974 as The Tennessean Truck Stop; rebuilt after a fire and reopened/rebranded in June 2026 as Dolly's Tennessean Travel Stop. Amenities include 24-hour diesel, restaurant/deli, convenience store, showers, laundry, CAT Scale, tire repair, truck repairs, RV parking and Wi-Fi. Directories list roughly 100 truck parking spaces, 5 fuel lanes and 4 showers.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Dolly's Tennessean Travel Stop
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Dolly's Tennessean Travel Stop (formerly The Tennessean Truck Stop) at I-65 Exit 22 in Cornersville. Available with the travel stop's 24-hour operation.

Business Name: Pilot Travel Center #406
Description: Pilot Travel Center at I-65 Exit 22 in Cornersville. 24-hour truck stop with diesel, convenience store, deli, showers, certified CAT Scale, and truck parking.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #406
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Pilot Travel Center #406 at I-65 Exit 22 in Cornersville. Available with the travel center's 24-hour operation.

Business Name: Shady Lawn Truck Stop
Description: Independent 24-hour truck stop at I-65 Exit 6 (TN-273/Bryson Rd, Elkton), known for its 'Big Chicken' restaurant. Amenities include 24-hour diesel, restaurant, convenience/trucker store, showers, laundry, ATM, certified scales, RV parking, trailer drop, a trucker's lounge, Wi-Fi, 4 truck service bays and on-site tire/truck repair. Directories list roughly 42 truck parking spaces, 4 fuel lanes and 4 showers on a lighted, paved lot.

Business Name: Shady Lawn Truck Stop Tire & Repair
Description: On-site commercial tire and truck-repair service at Shady Lawn Truck Stop, I-65 Exit 6, Elkton. Offers tire repair/sales (Bandag, Bridgestone, Firestone, Goodyear, Michelin) and truck repairs across 4 service bays, available with the truck stop's 24-hour operation.

Business Name: Motel 6 Pulaski, TN
Description: Budget motel at I-65 Exit 14 (US-64, Pulaski) offering free on-site car and truck parking. Amenities include free Wi-Fi, a 24-hour front desk, laundry facilities and an on-site restaurant (Nick's Grill); pet-friendly.

Business Name: Tennessee Welcome Center - I-65 (Ardmore, Northbound)
Description: TDOT Tennessee Welcome Center on I-65 northbound near mile marker 3 in Ardmore (at the Alabama state line, Giles County). Open 24 hours with restrooms, water, picnic tables and separate truck/passenger parking. Signed 2-hour parking limit; overnight parking is not allowed.

Business Name: TDOT I-65 Truck Parking Area (former Northbound Weigh Station, Giles County)
Description: During TDOT's I-65 Phase 1 widening (south of SR 25 to south of SR 109, completed September 2024), a former northbound weigh station in Giles County was converted into a truck parking area. Exact mile marker/exit, capacity and overnight-parking rules are not confirmed from an official source.

Business Name: I-65 Giles County Weigh Station (Northbound, Ardmore)
Description: Tennessee Highway Patrol commercial-vehicle scale complex historically listed on I-65 northbound near mile marker 5-6 in Giles County (Ardmore). Operational status is uncertain: TDOT's 2021-2024 I-65 widening reportedly converted a northbound weigh station in this area into a truck parking area, while THP CVE listings still reference a Giles County scale house.

Business Name: Love's Travel Stop #346
Description: Love's Travel Stop at I-65 Exit 46 (Bear Creek Pike / SR-99 / US-412) in Columbia. 24-hour truck stop with diesel, showers, certified CAT Scale, Arby's, on-site Love's Truck Care, and truck parking; RV-friendly.

Business Name: CAT Scale — Love's Travel Stop #346, Columbia
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Love's Travel Stop #346, I-65 Exit 46 (Bear Creek Pike / SR-99), Columbia. Open 24 hours.

Business Name: Love's Truck Care — Love's Travel Stop #346
Description: Love's Truck Care service center co-located at Love's Travel Stop #346, I-65 Exit 46, Columbia. Tire service, light mechanical, oil/PM services and roadside assistance from on-site service bays.

Business Name: Quality Inn Columbia I-65
Description: Choice Hotels Quality Inn near I-65 Exit 46 (Bear Creek Pike) in Columbia. Third-party listings indicate RV/bus/truck parking is available; not confirmed on the official brand page.

Business Name: TA Franklin (TravelCenters of America #157)
Description: Full-service TravelCenters of America truck stop (#157) at I-65 Exit 61 (Peytonsville Rd / Goose Creek Bypass) on the south Franklin approach, Williamson County. Reported: 7 fuel lanes, 24-hour BP diesel, 74 truck parking spaces, 6 showers, on-site CAT Scale, TA Truck Service (2 repair bays), Country Pride restaurant, bulk DEF, ATM, laundry. Open 24 hours.

Business Name: CAT Scale - TA Franklin #157
Description: CAT Scale located at TA Franklin (TravelCenters of America #157), I-65 Exit 61 (Peytonsville Rd), Williamson County.

Business Name: TA Truck Service - TA Franklin #157
Description: TA Truck Service commercial repair shop co-located at TA Franklin (#157), I-65 Exit 61, Williamson County. Two service bays offering tire repair/replacement, brakes, electrical, DOT inspections, diagnostics, HVAC, trailer and aftertreatment work; 24/7 roadside via RoadSquad.

Business Name: Love's Travel Stop #429
Description: 24-hour Love's Travel Stop at the Trinity Lane (US-431) interchange in north Nashville, on the I-65/I-24 concurrency where I-65 exit numbers are retained (I-65 northbound exit 87B). Formerly Pilot Travel Center #292; rebranded to Love's #429 (same site/phone). Diesel, showers, Subway, convenience store, CAT Scale on site, and a Love's Truck Care tire/service center (listed separately). Reported truck parking count varies by source (49 vs 65), left blank pending confirmation.

Business Name: CAT Scale — Love's Travel Stop #429, Nashville
Description: CAT Scale certified truck scale co-located at Love's Travel Stop #429 at the Trinity Lane (US-431) interchange, I-65 exit 87 in north Nashville (I-65/I-24 concurrency, I-65 numbering retained).

Business Name: Love's Truck Care - Love's Travel Stop #429
Description: Love's Truck Care center co-located at Love's Travel Stop #429, Trinity Lane (I-65 exit 87), Nashville. Four truck service bays offering commercial truck tire sales/service (verified Bridgestone/Firestone commercial tire dealer at this address), 24-hour emergency road service, and light mechanical/oil service.

Business Name: Love's Travel Stop #629
Description: 24-hour Love's Travel Stop on I-65 at Exit 108 (TN-76) in White House. Diesel and DEF, showers, convenience store, ATM, dog park, Wi-Fi, and dedicated truck parking. On-site CAT Scale and Love's Truck Care / Speedco service center are listed separately.

Business Name: CAT Scale — Love's Travel Stop #629, White House
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Love's Travel Stop #629 on I-65 at Exit 108 (TN-76) in White House. Weigh service available during travel-stop hours.

Business Name: Love's Truck Care / Speedco — Love's #629, White House
Description: Love's Truck Care (Speedco) heavy-duty truck service center co-located at Love's Travel Stop #629 on I-65 at Exit 108 in White House. Commercial tire sales/service (Bridgestone, Michelin, Goodyear, Yokohama, Love's Retread), oil change / PM, light mechanical, and emergency roadside assistance.

Business Name: MAPCO Express #1028
Description: Independent/branded MAPCO truck stop on I-65 at Exit 112 (TN-25) in Cross Plains. 24-hour diesel, bulk DEF, Subway/deli, convenience store, showers, Wi-Fi, and truck parking.

Business Name: Park City Truck Park (Truck Parking Club)
Description: Reservable truck and trailer parking at Park City - Nashville Truck Parking near I-65 north of Nashville in Goodlettsville. Large gravel lot with 24/7 access; short- and long-term (hourly/daily/weekly/monthly) reservations via Truck Parking Club. Lounge/showers reported as planned/under development.

Business Name: Twice Daily / Daily's #6603 (Goodlettsville)
Description: Twice Daily / Daily's #6603 fuel and convenience travel center on I-65 at Exit 97 (TN-174, Long Hollow Pike) in Goodlettsville. 24-hour diesel, bulk DEF, convenience store, ATM. Held: reported truck parking is minimal/conflicting (sources indicate 'no parking' to ~2 spaces), so overnight truck-stop category-fit is unconfirmed.

Business Name: Tennessee Weigh Station — I-65 Southbound (Robertson County, near KY line)
Description: Southbound Tennessee weigh/inspection station on I-65 in Robertson County near the Kentucky state line (SR 25 / Mitchellville area, roughly MM 121). Per TDOT, the southbound station was being rebuilt with new scales, a truck inspection station, and ~36 additional parking spaces (contract let June 2024, estimated completion Q3 2026). Held pending confirmation of exact mile marker and current operational status during/after construction.

Business Name: I-65 Northbound Truck Parking Area (former weigh station, Robertson County)
Description: Per TDOT, the former northbound I-65 weigh station in Robertson County (near the Kentucky state line / SR 25) was converted into a truck parking area during a widening project completed September 19, 2024. Held: facility name, number of spaces, exact location, and legal overnight-parking status are not independently confirmed.
